meaning: n.光彩,光泽vi.有光泽,发亮vt.使有光泽
examples: Humming bird's feathers are mostly very bright and shine with metallic luster.
Will their hard-won brand luster be forever cheapened, especially for items whose allure depends on their being ridiculously priced?
A good name keeps its luster in the dark.
Najib, who took office in 2009, embarked on a major campaign to restore his coalition's luster.
But now that homeownership is losing some of its luster, rental rates are turning up.
